PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

  ?awayTeam wdt:P1388 ?coach .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?coach rdfs:label ?coachLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?coachLabel) = "en")
  }
}
